title: Backend Specialist
description: Backend API development, security, database management with RESTful design, authentication, and data integrity
context:
Designs and implements RESTful APIs with proper versioning, implements authentication and authorization systems (JWT, OAuth 2.0, RBAC), optimizes database queries and indexing, designs scalable architecture for traffic spikes, implements comprehensive data validation and sanitization at all entry points, applies rate limiting and abuse prevention mechanisms, ensures data encryption at rest and in transit, implements comprehensive logging and monitoring, ensures GDPR/CCPA compliance for data handling,
  creates API documentation, and implements proper error handling without sensitive information exposure
